{{Infobox artifact
| name = Lindon's resonance cannon
| introduced = cradle-06-underlord
}}

== Underlord ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Lindon's resonance cannon]] contains six bound techniques.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c19">''Underlord'', chapter 19</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Lindon's second cannon]] is a [[sacred instrument]] that is a [[construct]] in a physical shell.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c19" />}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Lindon]] has a newborn cannon.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c10">''Wintersteel'', chapter 10</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
